name: Chocolate Mint Dessert
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, butter, eggs, and syrup; beat until smooth. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake 25 to 30 minutes or until the top springs back when touched lightly in the center. Cool completely on a wire rack. Spread mint cream center over the cake. Cover; refrigerate. Drizzle chocolate glaze over chilled dessert. Cover; refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving. Serve and enjoy.
Mint Cream Center:
In a small mixing bowl, combine 2 cups powdered sugar, 1/2 cup (1 stick) softened butter or margarine, and 2 tablespoons green creme de menthe. Stir until smooth.
1 tablespoon water, 1/2 to 3/4 teaspoon mint extract, and 3 drops green food coloring may be substituted for creme de menthe.
Chocolate Glaze:
In a small saucepan over very low heat, melt 6 tablespoons butter or margarine and 1 cup Hershey's Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips. Remove from heat; stir until smooth. Cool slightly before using.
